Missing individual F001-F060 function workbooks (new) -- also the source of F020/F021's real configuration, F026/F050's real price sheet, F046/F047's actual checklist content, and F035/F036/F038/F039/F040's actual check thresholds/frequency
filesRequiringReview: docs/development/ARCHITECTURE.md (target architecture proposal, frontend build-step recommendation)
knownRisks: No organization/tenant concept exists in the pre-Care-Hub codebase at all -- F001 is a from-scratch build, not an extension
Netlify Blobs has no secondary indexes; list()-scan pattern may not scale to Care Hub query needs
No payment webhook infrastructure exists at all
Customer documents/images are stored as base64 data URIs in Blobs, not object storage with signed URLs
Two independent, near-duplicated single-file staff/customer console apps (admin.html, myaccount.html) -- still not extracted
F-numbering collision between audit findings (F001-F036) and Business Care Hub functions (F001-F060) -- mitigated via naming convention
src/audit/blobsAuditSink.js and src/settings/blobsSettingsStore.js are written but not integration-tested against live Netlify Blobs
src/policy/rbac.js's ROLE_CAPABILITIES map is a transcription of the Roles & Permissions sheet's prose, not a workbook (none exists yet)

Most of the codebase's logic layer by Session 6 is engines/interpreters (triage, priority, pricing, entitlement, checklist scoring, evidence categorization) with no real business configuration behind them yet -- this is the expected, correct result of the blocking process across 6 sessions, not stalled progress

F035/F036/F038/F039/F040's actual check-EXECUTION logic (HTTP fetch, DOM parsing, SSRF protection) is not implemented -- only the result shape and reporting layer exist; building the fetch/scan engine is real, separate work that should adapt the existing website-audit spec's design (which already solved SSRF protection for a similar use case) rather than starting from zero

F046/F047's checklists and F042's reports must stay strictly assessment/observation-only (never store credentials, never claim guarantees) -- enforced structurally today (ChecklistResponse.met is boolean-only; evidenceCategorization.js rejects guarantee language) but needs to stay that way through every future session that touches this code

None of Sessions 2-6's pure logic modules are wired to real data yet -- all tested against synthetic fixtures only; first real integration test happens once F001 persistence exists and an actual endpoint calls them
